name: create_product
description: Create a new product in your Paddle catalog. Products represent what you sell and can have one or more prices attached. After creating a product, you define prices for it to set up billing. Products can be digital goods, SaaS subscriptions, or any other offering.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the product, displayed to customers at checkout.

parameters.name: tax_category
parameters.description: The tax category for this product. Determines how taxes are calculated. Common values: 'standard', 'digital-goods', 'saas'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A short description of the product, shown at checkout.
parameters.example: Access to all pro features including priority support

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: URL of the product image displayed at checkout. Must be HTTPS.

parameters.name: custom_data
parameters.description: Custom key-value pairs to store additional product metadata.

body.name: Pro Plan
body.description: Access to all pro features including priority support

data.name: Pro Plan
data.description: Access to all pro features including priority support
